description: Focused Phase 3 scenario pack used by the MVP to test staged reasoning, missing-fact handling, uncertainty behavior, and action selection.

scenarios.label: Explicit Airway Emergency
scenarios.description: Bystander reports abnormal breathing and poor responsiveness after a high-confidence fall.
scenarios.expected_focus: Immediate red flags should override uncertainty and push emergency dispatch.

answers.consciousness: The patient is barely responding and looks confused.
answers.pain_mobility: He is breathing strangely and not answering properly.
answers.breathing_bleeding: I am a bystander and he is breathing abnormally after the fall.

scenarios.label: Critical With Missing Head Strike
scenarios.description: Older adult on blood thinners with a severe fall and limited answers, but no confirmed head strike yet.
scenarios.expected_focus: The system should surface head strike as the top missing fact and prefer confirmation-pending escalation.

answers.consciousness: Yes, I am awake but dizzy.
answers.pain_mobility: I have strong pain and cannot get up safely.
answers.head_injury_blood_thinner: I take blood thinners, but I am not sure if I hit my head.

scenarios.label: Conflicting Stability Signals
scenarios.description: Patient reports breathing normally but also gives signals that conflict with stable mobility.
scenarios.expected_focus: Contradictions should reduce confidence and keep the reasoning trace easy to inspect.

answers.consciousness: Yes, I am awake and speaking clearly.
answers.pain_mobility: I only have mild pain, but I also cannot stand for long.
answers.observation: I am breathing normally and did not pass out.
